name: LA Palisades Fire - January 2025
description: Wildfire damage analysis for the Palisades Fire that started January 7, 2025 in Pacific Palisades, California. This catastrophic wildfire burned over 21,000 acres and threatened thousands of structures in the coastal community.

user_question: Analyze the burn damage from the Palisades Fire in Pacific Palisades, California that started in January 2025.
